diff: Operational GovOps Soter Labs, Operational Facilitator Endgame Edge, and Prime Agent Grove can change the signers of the Avalanche SkyLink Freezer Multisig so long as:
- two (2) signers are required to execute transactions;
- two (2) signers are controlled by Operational GovOps Soter Labs;
- two (2) signers are controlled by Operational Facilitator Endgame Edge; and
- one (1) signer is controlled by Prime Agent Grove.
description: Adds documentation for the Avalanche SkyLink Bridge, specifying Freezer Multisig configuration, Rate Limits, and Validator parameters.

prTitle: Atomic Atlas: decompose Sky Atlas.md into one-folder-per-document tree + sync tooling
